Short CV

Özgün Arda KUŞ graduated from Maltepe University, Faculty of Communication, Department of Public Relations and Publicity  and Department of Psychology Double Major Program with 100% scholarship. He completed his master's degree at Okan University, Department of Business Administration, Department of Sales and Marketing. He  completed his doctorate education at İstanbul University, Department of Public Relations and Publicity, with the title "Digital games as an interactive communication field: A research on the effects of gaming motivations on digital game addiction".
